name: GH_SliderGripDisplay
summary: Enumerates the possible slider grip displays.

enum_values.name: Numeric
enum_values.summary: A single box containing the slider value is drawn.

enum_values.name: Shape
enum_values.summary: A constant shape grip is drawn (round for floating point, diamond for integers)

enum_values.name: ShapeAndText
enum_values.summary: Same as Shape, but text with the slider value is drawn besides the grip.
